queries.q: Before I start building this SaaS idea, tell me the one thing most likely to make it fail and whether it's worth doing at all
A customer asked us to add SSO. Should we build it now, or is that premature?
queries.notes: Feature-change mode; demand-hierarchy call before committing

queries.q: We're thinking of expanding our note-taking utility into a full platform; pour cold water on it before we commit
Is this AI meeting-summarizer idea worth building, or should I validate demand first?
Sales keeps asking for a bulk-export feature; sanity-check whether we should build it before I write it up
Should we honor this feature request, or is it scope creep that hides a harder problem?
I want to build a landing page and MVP for a freelancer-invoicing tool; what's the biggest risk and what should I validate first?
Competitors just shipped a Kanban view; should we copy it, or is that a trap?
Give me a build, validate, or cut verdict on adding a native mobile app to our web product
Before we put this on the roadmap, what assumption would kill it and how do I test that cheaply?
Write up the problem statement for our mobile checkout drop-off, with user impact and success criteria
queries.notes: Framing a confirmed problem, not a build verdict

queries.q: We launched six months ago, growth has stalled, and the data shows users churn after week two; document whether we should pivot or persevere
queries.notes: Post-launch pivot-or-persevere with usage data: the closest boundary

queries.q: Build me a full lean canvas for this new product thesis across all nine blocks
queries.notes: Full business-model canvas, not a single-risk gate

queries.q: Run RICE and MoSCoW over these twelve feature requests and show me where they disagree
queries.notes: Ranking a list, not one build decision

queries.q: We believe onboarding emails will lift activation; turn that into a testable hypothesis with success metrics
queries.notes: Designing the test for a chosen assumption

queries.q: Our paid product has flat retention and the market shifted under us; make the persevere-or-pivot call with the evidence
Reframe this drifted project around the original problem we set out to solve, for leadership
queries.notes: Re-anchoring a problem, not a build verdict

queries.q: Stress-test our existing business model and compare two strategic options side by side
queries.notes: Business-model stress-test across the canvas blocks

queries.q: Debug this null pointer exception showing up in our checkout service logs
Find me a hotel near the Berlin conference center for next week
